calendar.matters:
Petition To Compel Trustee To Distribute; For Breach Of Trust; For An Award Of Attorneys Fees And Costs; And To Prohibit Expenditure Of Trust Funds
Off Calendar Apr-26-2019 Off Calendar

REPORT OF SALE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (7474 La Mancha Way, Sacramento, Ca)
Off Calendar Jul-06-2017 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Ernest Der for and with petitioner Debre Dolch.

Cause comes on for sale of the 100% interest in the real property located at 7474 La Mancha Street, Sacramento, California. The opening bid is $9,500,000.00. The Court announces the first overbid would be $9,975,000.00. There are no overbidders. The sale was confirmed at $9.500,000.00 based on the terms and conditions as set forth in the report of sale filed May 30, 2017. The Court granted the Petition to Confirm Sale of Real Property located at 7474 La Mancha Street, Sacramento, California (subject to review of the order). An additional bond in the amount of $4,050,000.00 is required. The Court inquired as to the manner in which the additional bond was calculated. Mr. Der responded that it represented the unencumbered value of the remaining property.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Craig Blackstone. Bailiff: Deputy Nuque. (Not reported)

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Report Of Sale And Petition For Order Confirming Sale Of Real Property (10430 Coloma Road, Rancho Cordova, Ca)
Off Calendar Jun-13-2017 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Cases PTR-17-300859 and PTR-17-300889 are related and were heard together.
Appearances: Ernest F. Der, for and with petitioner Debra Dolch.

Cause comes on for sale of real property located at 10430 Coloma Road, Rancho Cordova, California. The opening bid was in the amount of $5,750,000.00, which the Court found was a qualifying bid. There were no overbidders. The sale was confirmed at $5,750,000.00 based on the terms and conditions as set forth in the report of sale filed May 10, 2017. The Court granted the Petition to Confirm Sale of Real Property, subject to review of the order. An additional bond in the amount of $4,150,000.00 is required.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Craig Blackstone. Bailiff: Deputy Jaime. (Not reported)
